positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical forest creature silhouette, resembling a fox combined with a celestial spirit, standing at the confluence of starlight and bioluminescent flora. The creature should have clean, flowing lines and a proud, elegant posture. The background should be a deep indigo and teal gradient, subtly incorporating constellations and stylized leaf patterns. The overall aesthetic must be high-contrast, black line work on colored fill, suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting, central composition, detailed flora, seamless repeat pattern capability.
negative: low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, signature, logo, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noisy, photorealistic, CGI, gradient noise, jpeg artifacts
